title: One new hospitalization and thirty new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta May 28–31
summary: On May 28, YKHC reports one in-region hospitalization and eighteen new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. One in-region hospitalization YKHC reports that one COVID-19 positive individual was admitted into the Yukon-Kuskokwim Delta Regional Hospital. This is the 156th individual hospitalized in-regio...

title: Notice of BSNC Board Vacancy/Solicitation of Letters of Interest
summary: A vacancy has occurred on the Board of Directors of Bering Straits Native Corporation. The board will consider an appointment to this seat at a special meeting to be held in July 2022. In accordance with the corporate bylaws, the person appointed to fill the vacancy will serve until the annual share...

title: Going Live! Podcast: What’s Bugging Our Forest?
summary: Back by popular demand, we have our Journeyman Lineman, Sam Clyde with us to talk about the summer’s work plan, and how HEA is working to keep us safe from hazardous trees caused by the Peninsula’s spruce bark beetle infestation. title: The Pink Flamingo Rises Again
summary: Sea lions, a pink flamingo, and a feather boa. The post The Pink Flamingo Rises Again appeared first on Alaska Magazine .
